name: Chicago Italian Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 lb rare roast beef, sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beef stock, water, tomato paste, crushed red pepper, salt, and bay leaf in a skillet.
2. Add minced garlic and stir to combine.
3. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed.
5. Add roast beef slices and green pepper slices to the pan.
6. Cook, uncovered, for an additional 15 minutes until the beef is cooked through.
7. While the beef is cooking, preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Place the loaves of Italian bread in the oven and heat for a few minutes until lightly toasted.
9. Cut each loaf of bread in half lengthwise.
10. Dip each piece of bread into the pan liquid on one side before assembling the sandwich.
11. Assemble sandwiches by dividing the beef and peppers evenly between the four loaves of bread.
